meaning: (=leveller)n.平均主义者,水平测量员,轧平机
examples: Leveling mechanism of leveler AR in reactive dyeing is discussed.
WC43 series leveler is integral lifting roller leveler with many top rolls.
"Television is becoming the great leveler, " says Meenakshi Madhvani, head of Karat India, an international media-buying outfit.
Nonetheless, it certainly is ironic to see the Internet, the great equalizer, leveler of playing fields, transformed into a giant game of Monopoly.
